steps.title: Find claim and evidence
steps.content: The sentence claims that the World Cup used to be smaller and more geographically limited. The next sentence gives a concrete historical instance: the 1934 event had only 16 teams, mostly from Europe and the Americas.

steps.title: Choose the example transition
steps.content: A merely affirms the prior sentence, B creates a contrast, and D adds a parallel point. The sentence needs a transition that introduces a specific example supporting the general claim. The answer is C.
